sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105293" key="tri/sxhmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-σχημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105293.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of triple form, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0022.tlg001:2:307" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.307</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
